channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NTPCGREEN] NTPC Green Energy Limited Declares Commercial Operation of Fourth Part Capacity of 165 MW in Khavda-II Solar PV Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NTPC Green Energy Limited, a subsidiary of NTPC Limited, has declared the commercial operation of the fourth part capacity of 165 MW out of 1200 MW Khavda-II Solar PV Project located in Gujarat. This project is a subsidiary of NTPC Renewable Energy Limited. The current commercial capacity of NTPC Green Energy Limited Group stands at 9562.68 MW. With the addition of this capacity, the total installed capacity of the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group will increase to 9727.68 MW.

  • NTPC Green Energy Limited declares commercial operation of fourth part capacity of 165 MW in Khavda-II Solar PV Project.
  • Project is located in Gujarat and is a subsidiary of NTPC Renewable Energy Limited.
  • Current commercial capacity of NTPC Green Energy Limited Group stands at 9562.68 MW.
  • With the addition of this capacity, the total installed capacity of the NTPC Green Energy Limited Group will increase to 9727.68 MW.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NTPC Green Energy Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ORCHIDPHAR] Orchid Pharma's Scheme of Amalgamation with Dhanuka Laboratories Reserved for Formal Pronouncement
item.description:
Orchid Pharma Ltd. has provided an update on the Scheme of Amalgamation with Dhanuka Laboratories Limited. The order on the merger petition has been reserved for formal pronouncement by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) on March 18, 2026. The company will notify the Stock Exchanges and update its website upon receipt of the NCLT order. This development comes in continuation of earlier intimations regarding the merger petition pending with the NCLT.

  • Orchid Pharma provided an update on the Scheme of Amalgamation with Dhanuka Laboratories.
  • The order on the merger petition has been reserved for formal pronouncement by the NCLT.
  • The company will notify the Stock Exchanges and update its website upon receipt of the NCLT order.
  • This development comes in continuation of earlier intimations regarding the merger petition pending with the NCLT.
  • The Scheme of Amalgamation is a significant step in the growth and consolidation of Orchid Pharma.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Orchid Pharma Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [GFIL] Raconteur Global Resources Ltd: Appointment of Mr. Surinder Kalra as Internal Auditor, Issue of Equity Shares, and Warrants Conversion
item.description:
Raconteur Global Resources Ltd has appointed Mr. Surinder Kalra as Internal Auditor. The company's Board of Directors has also approved the allotment of equity shares and warrants convertible into equity shares on a preferential basis. The equity shares are priced at INR 14 each, with 1149998 shares allotted to non-promoters and 4414285 shares upon conversion of a loan amounting to INR 6,17,99,990. Additionally, 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares have been allotted at INR 14 each, including a premium of INR 4 per warrant. The allottees include various individuals and companies.

  • Appointment of Mr. Surinder Kalra as Internal Auditor
  • Allotment of equity shares to non-promoters and upon conversion of a loan
  • Allotment of warrants convertible into equity shares
  • Total issued and paid-up capital of the Company stands at Rs. 10,77,78,440/-

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ganesh Films India Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [GFIL] Raconteur Global Resources Ltd Announces Allotment of Equity Shares and Warrants on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Raconteur Global Resources Ltd has announced the allotment of equity shares and warrants on a preferential basis. The Board of Directors approved the allotment of 1149998 equity shares to non-promoters/public category for cash consideration, and 4414285 equity shares upon conversion of a loan amounting to INR 6,17,99,990. Additionally, 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares were allotted to non-promoters/public shareholders. The company has also appointed Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as an Additional Director and Mr. Surinder Kalra as an Internal Auditor. The allottees of equity shares and warrants are listed in the annexures.

  • Allotment of 1149998 equity shares to non-promoters/public category
  • Allotment of 4414285 equity shares upon conversion of a loan
  • Allotment of 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares
  • Appointment of Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as an Additional Director
  • Appointment of Mr. Surinder Kalra as an Internal Auditor

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ganesh Films India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GFIL] Raconteur Global Resources Ltd: Appointment of Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as Additional Director and Equity Shares Allotment
item.description:
Raconteur Global Resources Ltd has appointed Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as an Additional Director in the capacity of Non-Executive Independent Director. The Board has also approved the allotment of equity shares and warrants on a preferential basis. The equity shares are being allotted to Non-Promoters/Public Category for cash consideration, while the warrants are being issued to Non-Promoters/Public shareholder Category. The total issued and paid-up capital of the Company will increase to Rs. 10,77,78,440/- (Ten Crore Seventy Seven Lakh Seventy Eight Thousand Four Hundred Forty) upon allotment.

  • Appointment of Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as Additional Director
  • Allotment of equity shares to Non-Promoters/Public Category for cash consideration
  • Allotment of warrants to Non-Promoters/Public shareholder Category
  • Increase in the issued and paid-up capital of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ganesh Films India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GFIL] Raconteur Global Resources Ltd Appoints Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as Additional Director and Allots Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Raconteur Global Resources Ltd has appointed Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as an Additional Director in the capacity of Non-Executive Independent Director. The company has also allotted equity shares on a preferential basis to various non-promoters, amounting to a total of 1149998 shares for a consideration of INR 1,60,99,972. Additionally, 4414285 equity shares were allotted upon conversion of a loan amounting to INR 6,17,99,990. The company has also allotted 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares at a price of INR 14/- per warrant, amounting to INR 10,14,99,972, to non-promoters/public shareholders. The warrants can be converted into equity shares within 18 months from the date of allotment.

  • Appointment of Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as Additional Director
  • Allotment of 1149998 equity shares on preferential basis for cash consideration
  • Allotment of 4414285 equity shares upon conversion of loan
  • Allotment of 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares on preferential basis

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ganesh Films India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [APOLLO] Apollo Micro Systems Ltd. Gets Trading Approval for 11,696 Equity Shares
item.description:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd. has received trading approvals from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for 11,696 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each. These shares were issued and allotted on a preferential basis to non-promoters. The trading of these shares commenced on the NSE and BSE from 19th March 2026.

  • Trading approvals granted by NSE and BSE for 11,696 equity shares
  • Shares issued and allotted on preferential basis to non-promoters
  • Trading of shares commenced on NSE and BSE from 19th March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GFIL] Raconteur Global Resources Ltd: Board Approves Equity Share Allotment, Warrant Issue, and Director Appointments
item.description:
Raconteur Global Resources Ltd held a Board Meeting on 18th March 2026, where they approved several key agenda items. The company decided to allot equity shares worth INR 1,60,99,972 to non-promoters/public category and 4414285 equity shares upon conversion of loan. Additionally, 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares were approved for allotment to non-promoters/public shareholders. The company also appointed Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as Additional Director and Mr. Surinder Kalra as Internal Auditor. The issued and paid-up capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 10,77,78,440/-.

  • Allotment of equity shares worth INR 1,60,99,972 to non-promoters/public category
  • Allotment of 4414285 equity shares upon conversion of loan
  • Allotment of 7249998 warrants convertible into equity shares
  • Appointment of Mr. Arvinder Singh Kohli as Additional Director
  • Appointment of Mr. Surinder Kalra as Internal Auditor

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ganesh Films India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VEDL] Vedanta Ltd. Announces Board Meeting to Consider Third Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Vedanta Ltd. has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 23, 2026, to consider and approve the third interim dividend on equity shares, if any, for the Financial Year 2025-26. The record date for determining the entitlement of the equity shareholders for the said dividend, if declared, is fixed as March 28, 2026. The trading window for dealing in securities of the Company will be closed for all Designated Persons from March 19, 2026, to March 25, 2026.

  • Vedanta Ltd. board meeting scheduled for March 23, 2026, to consider third interim dividend for FY 2025-26
  • Record date for dividend entitlement set as March 28, 2026
  • Trading window closure for Designated Persons from March 19, 2026, to March 25, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vedanta Limited | Category: Dividend

item.title: [APOLLO] Apollo Micro Systems Ltd. Granted Trading Approval for 28,89,044 Equity Shares
item.description:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd. has received trading approvals from National Stock Exchange of India limited (NSE) and BSE limited (BSE) for 28,89,044 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each. These shares were issued and allotted on Preferential Issue basis to the Non Promoters. The shares are listed and admitted to dealings on the Exchange from 19th March 2026. The lock-in details are mentioned in Annexure L.

  • Trading approvals granted by NSE and BSE for 28,89,044 equity shares
  • Shares issued and allotted on Preferential Issue basis to the Non Promoters
  • Listed and admitted to dealings on the Exchange from 19th March 2026
  • Lock-in details mentioned in Annexure L

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd | Category: New Launch
